ksa_text: Knowledge of AI and machine learning-specific model risk considerations, including data drift, concept drift, black-box explainability requirements, model instability, and how traditional model risk frameworks must adapt for non-parametric, ensemble, deep learning, and foundation models.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-008 (AI Governance) scores 0.549 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Data Architect: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Data Architect.

decision_rationale: AI Governance is out of scope for Data Architect.
